603 V0200A20B_RTN_CMNTY_CPL_CD V0200A20B_RTN_CMNTY_CPL_CD V0200A20B Return to Community Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Return to Community care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information

604 V0200B2_CAT_DT V0200B2_CAT_DT V0200B2 Care Area Assessment Completion Date CHAR 8 The data in this column contains the Care Area Assessment (CAA)
